title: Rogers completes Chelsea switch from Aston Villa
summary: Morgan Rogers has completed his move to Chelsea from Aston Villa in a British record deal worth 117 million pounds.

title: Chelsea complete Morgan Rogers signing, Blues beat Arsenal to stunning transfer
summary: Done Deal. British record deal. Chelsea complete Morgan Rogers signing as the Blues beat Arsenal to a stunning 138m euro transfer from Aston Villa.

title: Rogers first words after record-breaking Chelsea move
summary: Morgan Rogers has signed for Chelsea from Aston Villa for a British record fee of 117 million pounds. Aston Villa have signed Joao Gomes from Wolves for 38 million pounds.

title: Premier League summer transfers 2026: All the Done Deals
summary: Aston Villa have compensated for the loss of Tielemans with the club-record signing of Johan Manzambi and the arrival of Joao Gomes. Arsenal have signed Piero Hincapie on a permanent deal and Illan Meslier on a free transfer from Leeds United. The Gunners have also agreed a deal to sign Club Brugge winger Christos Tzolis, but they have missed out on Rogers, who joins Chelsea.
